REPORTS.description: KV Namespace used to store generated web report JSON.

UPLOAD_TOKEN.description: Shared secret used by the plugin and Worker.

scripts.deploy: python3 -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check uv >/dev/null && uv run pywrangler deploy
scripts.dev: python3 -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check uv >/dev/null && uv run pywrangler dev
